name: TaxaID
description: A modular R ecosystem for Bayesian taxonomic assignment of biological observations (eDNA sequences, images, acoustic recordings). Combines match-score likelihoods with spatially-explicit occurrence-based priors to compute posterior probabilities of taxonomic identity.

relatedCode.name: TaxaTools
relatedCode.description: Taxonomic name standardization and LLM utilities

relatedCode.name: TaxaFetch
relatedCode.description: Occurrence data acquisition from GBIF, DataONE, BioTIME, literature

relatedCode.name: TaxaMatch
relatedCode.description: Biological match data standardization and BLAST search

relatedCode.name: TaxaLikely
relatedCode.description: Convert match scores to likelihoods via hierarchical Bayesian model

relatedCode.name: TaxaHabitat
relatedCode.description: Habitat assignment via LLM biological consensus

relatedCode.name: TaxaExpect
relatedCode.description: Spatially-explicit Bayesian priors from occurrence data
